summary: arrivingByDay pre-filters through inflightOrders() so cancelled-after-shipping orders with a future ETA do not surface.
reason: lateOrders and where-is-my-stuff already restrict their input to inflightOrders(orders). arrivingByDay iterated the raw slice, so an order Amazon marked Cancelled after the carrier handoff (real Amazon scenario — the listing HTML keeps the future ETA but flips the status) would still appear in `arriving-soon`. Consistent inflight gating across the novel commands keeps the contract uniform.
